battery_life.description: The lengths of life (in months) of the manufacturer's best battery, with claimed population mean of 54 months and standard deviation of 6 months, both used in computing the z-score for the sampling distribution.

sample_size.description: The number of batteries in the consumer group's sample, used to compute the standard error σ_x̄ = σ/√n.

sample_mean_threshold.description: The sample mean value (52 months) for which the probability P(x̄ ≤ 52) is being calculated.
